steps: Request Nordea Custody to correct the withholding tax rate from 13.5% to 15% for Nokia Oyj dividend per FI-NO treaty
Submit formal claim to Nordea referencing the EUR 3,607.50 overpayment on account 2901234567
If Nordea cannot resolve, file refund application directly with Vero using Form 6163e/6167e for the excess withholding
Provide Nordea with authoritative FI-NO treaty documentation to support the 15% rate claim

references.title: Vero – Refund Application (Form 6163e + 6167e for corps, 6164e for individuals)
